blocking_reasons: The current diff adds both tests/verifier/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py and tests/conformance/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py with the same module basename. A local combined pytest collection run fails with an import file mismatch before executing tests: `PYTHONPATH=sdk/python/src pytest tests/verifier/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py tests/conformance/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py -q` exits 2. This blocks the regression from being safely collected with verifier and conformance tests in one session.
warnings: The issue-specific evidence in docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-139/test.md shows the two new test files passed when run in separate pytest invocations, but that does not cover combined collection.
validation: Review used only local repository files, local command output, and the issue text supplied in the prompt.

`git status --short` showed untracked additions under docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-139/, tests/conformance/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py, and tests/verifier/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py.
`git diff --stat` and `git diff --name-only` were empty because the relevant changes are untracked.
Inspected tests/verifier/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py and tests/conformance/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py directly from the working tree.
Inspected existing local verifier tests and fixture: tests/verifier/test_proof_bundle_schema.py, tests/sdk/test_bundle_builder.py, and tests/fixtures/bundles/valid_signed_attestation.json.

`PYTHONPATH=sdk/python/src pytest tests/verifier/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py tests/conformance/test_signed_schema_roundtrip.py -q` failed during collection with pytest import file mismatch between the two same-basename test modules.

Local evidence file docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-139/test.md reports passing separate runs for the issue-required verifier and conformance selectors, focused verifier/conformance regressions, fixture hash checks, signing tests, ruff, and a local fast gate.
residual_risks: Because the review found a collection blocker, broader gate behavior after fixing the basename collision still needs to be re-run.
The review did not contact GitHub or any external service; it relied on the issue text in the prompt and local repository evidence only.
Untracked files are not represented by `git diff`; this review inspected them directly, but any later staged diff should be rechecked.
